mapper.select: select count(*) from notification where receiver_id = #{id} and is_read = 0
select id, receiver_id AS receiverId, target_url AS targetUrl, type, title, message, is_read AS isRead, created_at AS createdAt from notification where receiver_id = #{id} order by created_at desc
mapper.insert: insert into notification ( receiver_id, target_url, type, title, message, is_read, created_at ) values ( #{receiverId}, #{targetUrl}, #{type}, #{title}, #{message}, #{isRead}, NOW() )
mapper.select: select agreed from user_terms where user_id = #{id} and terms_id = 4
mapper.delete: delete from notification where receiver_id = #{id} and is_read = 1
